title: Add request logging middleware
input: add express middleware that logs every request with method, path, status code, and duration in milliseconds. use console.log with ISO timestamp prefix. skip logging for /health endpoint.

requiredConstraints: add express middleware that logs every request with method, path, status code, and duration in milliseconds. use console.log with ISO timestamp prefix. skip logging for /health endpoint.
forbiddenAdditions: Do not add new storage systems or background jobs while addressing “Add request logging middleware”.
